body:
APPROVE
Clean, complete implementation. Spoke lifecycle is encapsulated in `cli/internal/federation/spoke.go` with persisted state for URL-change detection and stable identity fingerprint, server integration via `EnableSpokeMode`/`ShutdownSpoke`, and CLI flags `--hub` / `--federation-self-url`. Test coverage maps directly to each AC item, including best-effort behavior when the hub is dead.
artifact: .ddx/executions/20260502T174947-31ad40a4/reviewer-stream.log
